title: In-memory Implementation of On-chip Trainable and Scalable ANN for AI/ML Applications
authors: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: Not explicitly provided in the text
introduction: Discusses AI/ML algorithms, limitations of von Neumann architecture, benefits of in-memory computing, and ANN as tools for AI/ML applications
methodology: In-memory implementation of on-chip trainable and scalable ANN. Trained and tested on IRIS dataset
results: Proposed architecture is approximately 46× more energy efficient per MAC operation compared to earlier classifiers
